author: thegaram33
content:
Hey <@281967554572976128>, I shared the current progress here: https://discord.com/channels/595666850260713488/1451216716062523507/1521063588377268245

Specifically, this is the ethrex diff: https://github.com/lambdaclass/ethrex/compare/v18.0.0-rc.1...Thegaram:ethrex:eip-8142-block-in-blobs

The goal here was to prototype BiB to find spec and implementation concerns. But I'd love to hear any feedback from your team and eventually merge a version of this into upstream ethrex.

author: ivanlitteri
content:
Hey! This is great. We’ve taken a look at the diff and it looks very good overall .

Feel free to open a PR to further discuss implementation details there
